dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: They want you afraid. Fear makes you easier to control.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Your streets, so once again, run red with your blood.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: Raul Menendez ignited global unrest on an unprecedented scale.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: We're bringing peace and security to the world.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: He refuses to let me go.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: Stop looking backwards, David, but what matters is what we do next.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 3
dialogue_segments.text: A lot of people counting on us for answers.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Killing a man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: You were never cut out to be a Mason.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: No more games. This ends now.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 5
dialogue_segments.text: Get the Reznov challenge pack when you pre-order now.

summary: This audio clip features a dramatic, cinematic trailer for a Call of Duty video game, likely Black Ops II, featuring dialogue about global unrest, terrorism, and personal conflict between characters, concluding with a promotional message for a pre-order bonus.
